disambig-desc: Waxay ku dartaa summadda __DISAMBIG__ si loo calaamadiyo [[Special:DisambiguationPages|bogagga kala soocidda]]
disambiguationpages-summary:
Kuwa soo socda waa liiska dhammaan bogagga kala soocidda ee {{SITENAME}}.
Bog waxaa loo tiriyaa bog kala soocid haddii uu ku jiro sumadda __DISAMBIG__ (ama mid la mid ah).
disambiguationpagelinks: Bogagga ku xira bogagga kala soocidda
disambiguationpagelinks-summary:
Bogagga soo socda waxay ka kooban yihiin ugu yaraan hal xiriiriye oo u jeeda bog kala soocid. Waxaa laga yaabaa in loo baahdo in loo beddelo xiriiriye u jeeda bog ku habboon.
Bog waxaa loo tiriyaa bog kala soocid haddii uu ku jiro sumadda __DISAMBIG__ (ama mid la mid ah).
tag-disambiguator-link-added-description: Wax ka beddelada ku daraya xiriirro u jeeda bogagga kala soocidda
disambiguator-notification-question: Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad ka dhigto xiriirkan mid si ka sii gaar ah u tilmaamaya?
disambiguator-notification-summary: Waxaad ku xirtay "[[$1]]" oo aan ahayn bog ka kooban waxyaabaha, balse waa liis ah [https://mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:Disambiguator magacyo isku eg oo kala macne ah].
